title: Shovel Armor Trims
description: Make all shovels trimmable with all template and materials, upgrade your shovel with more than 1300 different looks !
body:
<details>
<summary>get more trims for your items:</summary>

- Sword trims ! https://modrinth.com/datapack/sword-trims
- Elytra trims ! https://modrinth.com/datapack/ks-elytra-trims
- Mace trims ! https://modrinth.com/datapack/ks-mace-trims
- Pickaxe trims ! https://modrinth.com/datapack/pickaxe-trims
- Axe trims ! https://modrinth.com/datapack/axe-trims
- Shovel trims ! https://modrinth.com/datapack/shovel-trims

</details>


![shovel trims text logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a8566fbe4053b29a2ac3c491566782a3145138c2.png)


This dapack/mod make shovels trimmable with any armor trim and any of the 11 smithing ingredients, making each shovel type having exactly 199 variants (including the default one) for a grand total of 1393 different looking shovels !!!

/!\ make sure to download the resourcepack ( https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/kspack ) if you are using the datapack version or the mod version on a server !!!

![all the shovel trims display](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/29537e0dd3d9eabf789d49a8fd40f33dde4a6c59.png)

This datapack/mod is serverside and fully vanilla compatible, players without the resourcepack/mod will only see a regular shovel but players with the resourcepack/mod will see every shovel trims !

If you have any issue/question, contact me on discord! (@nugrevan) : https://discord.gg/SxarRKTw8k, any feedback will be greatly appreciated, thanks !


Geyser/bedrock support : @Toxicdust on discord made a port of all the trims datapacks for GeyserMC, since those are not supported on modrinth, you can find it on the [discord server](https://discord.com/channels/1407508835643428988/1441199863831330929/1509831172174118956)
